economic_notes: First Nation holds 33.33% interest in Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group Limited Partnership focused on marine activities and economic development. Also has investment in Dzawada'enuxw Development Corporation.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to deferred revenue recognition issue - $8,327,040 of deferred revenue at March 31, 2023 may not meet PSAS criteria (prior year also qualified for same matter re $14,477,633). The First Nation records all unspent funds as deferred revenue rather than revenue, overstating deferred revenue. Deferred revenue balance is very large at $18,017,414. Net financial assets reported as net debt of -$612,982 per Statement of Changes in Net Debt (budget column shows net financial assets of $2,922,957). ISC funding reconciliation shows revenue per confirmation of $10,832,103 with significant deferral adjustments. No long-term debt as of year end (prior year had some repaid). Two entities accounted for under modified equity method: Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group Limited Partnership and Dzawada'enuxw Development Corporation.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
